pages.raw_text:
There are strong internal EVIL.
dences that the ticket or list Of men
suggested by the vested interests's
had its origin in a combination III
which w. J. c. Wakefield, director
of the Washington Water Power
Co., and large shareholder in and
attorney for the Spokane Brewing q
Mating Co., and Captain John Gray,
councilman from the Second ward
and representative Of the liquor In.
terests Of the city, played a promi-
nent part.


The forms used by the various
candidates are exact duplicates and
copies of the first filing paper used
and apparently prepared in w. j. c.
Wakefield's law office.


w. c. Gray, railroad contractor.
swore to his qualifications before

declaration, as did Fred Phair, +,

Clough, Frank Dorsey. e. p. Cal
braith, N. ]. Laumer. w. j. Sullivan
and DR.. Catterson.
